title: Zesty Media File
description: A Zesty.io media file represents an uploaded asset (image, document, video, etc.) stored in a media bin and served via CDN.

ZUID.description: The Zesty Universal Identifier for the file.

binZUID.description: The bin ZUID this file belongs to.

groupZUID.description: The group ZUID this file belongs to.

title.description: The display title of the file.

url.description: The CDN URL for the file.

type.description: The MIME type of the file.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the file was uploaded.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the file was last updated.
